raw_text: Hi, do you have interpreter services available for a Mandarin-speaking relative attending an outpatient clinic next month? How do I arrange one?

classification.reasoning: This is a straightforward informational question about the availability of language interpretation services and how to request them for a future appointment.

actions.detail: Reply drafted — enquiry is NOT covered by the knowledge base, so the draft promises a handoff instead of guessing.
actions.artifact:
Thank you for getting in touch. Unfortunately, information about interpreter services is not something I'm able to confirm from our current resources, so I'll pass your query to our information desk and someone will be in touch with you shortly.

What I can share is that for outpatient clinic appointments generally, you're welcome to contact the Outpatients office directly on (03) 5550 0000 (weekdays, 8:30am – 5:00pm) — they may also be able to assist with your interpreter query or point you in the right direction.

actions.detail: Enquiry not answerable from KB — routed to Front-of-House / Info Desk for a human response, with a follow-up flag set. Case left open.
